scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web
scripts.check:types: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:types && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:types
scripts.check:test:unit: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:test:unit && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:test:unit
scripts.check:test:component: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:test:component && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:test:component
scripts.check:test:integration: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:test:integration && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:test:integration
scripts.check:test: bun run check:test:unit && bun run check:test:component && bun run check:test:integration
scripts.check:coverage: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:coverage && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:coverage
scripts.check:lint: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:lint && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:lint
scripts.check:format: bun run --filter @chatroom/shared check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/server check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-core check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-codex check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/connector-copilot check:format && bun run --filter @chatroom/web check:format
scripts.check:all: bun run check:types && bun run check:test && bun run check:coverage && bun run check:lint && bun run check:format
